description_long: This is a weathered, rectangular vending machine with a predominantly blue exterior, accented by a white vertical stripe running along one side. The front features a display panel with labeled sections, a pull handle, and a mesh-covered window, all showing signs of rust and wear. The lower front section displays a faded orange and white logo, possibly representing a brand or product. Both sides have small vertical windows, likely for checking the contents inside, and one side also features the orange logo. The back is plain blue with significant rust patches, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, robust machine intended for public urban environments.
description: A blue, weathered vending machine with a white stripe, rust patches, a front display panel, and a faded orange logo.
description_view_0: Side view showing a blue surface with a white vertical stripe and a small rectangular window.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main interface: display panel, pull handle, mesh window, and orange logo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a white stripe, small window, and visible orange logo.
description_view_3: Rear view, plain blue with extensive rust and no visible features or openings.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located at the top front, featuring labeled sections and a small area with visible text and color blocks.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot and a bill acceptor are visible on the upper front panel, each labeled and separated by color.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Two rectangular buttons labeled 'PULL' are present below the display panel, spaced horizontally.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A large rectangular mesh-covered slot is located in the center of the front panel, below the selection buttons.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A faded orange and white logo resembling a planet or sun with a swoosh is visible on the lower front and right side.
